venues.name: Atlantide
venues.description: Main dining room, enlarged on Silver Moon to seat up to 220 guests. Refined global fare with grilled classics, seafood, and prime steaks. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Kitchen
venues.description: Sea And Land Taste — Silver Moon's flagship dining innovation, debuted at launch. Destination-driven menus changing daily by port, spotlighting local producers and regional techniques with 160+ regional wines. Complimentary; dinner only, open seating.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian restaurant serving buffet breakfast and lunch with live cooking stations; evening à la carte with handmade pastas and seafood. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Poolside casual dining by day. Evening Hot Rocks service — guests cook prime meats and seafood on 400°C volcanic lava stones tableside. Reservations required evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: Spaccanapoli
venues.description: Open-air poolside Neapolitan pizzeria with wood-fired pies and Italian snacks. Adjacent gelato bar. Open for lunch and dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: Silver Note
venues.description: Late-night jazz supper club open from 8 pm. Tapas-style international small plates with live jazz and blues. Each guest orders several individual plates. Complimentary.

venues.name: Kaiseki
venues.description: Sushi and sashimi bar by day (complimentary). Evening teppanyaki and omakase-style Japanese fine dining — miso black cod, wagyu beef, kushiyaki. Dinner supplement approximately $40 per person; reservations required.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: Silversea's French fine-dining restaurant (Relais & Châteaux), moved to Deck 8 on Silver Moon with expanded ocean views and enlarged to ~56 seats. White-glove service, classic French haute cuisine. Dinner only; supplement approximately $60 per person.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Lab / Chef's Table
venues.description: Dedicated culinary workshop on Deck 4 for daytime cooking classes, tastings, and demonstrations with local guest chefs. Transforms into an intimate 11-course S.A.L.T. Chef's Table in the evenings. Surcharge applies for Chef's Table.

venues.name: Arts Café
venues.description: All-day café on Deck 8 serving specialty coffees, pastries, sandwiches, and light bites. Complimentary throughout the day.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining including an Otium comfort-food menu. Full service from breakfast through late night delivered to every suite.
